New chat

Plan me a weekend hike near Snowdonia — I want a route with a gpx file and a packing checklist.

Here is a two-day plan with escape routes marked. See the route notes for detail.

Packing list

  • Water (2l minimum)
  • Map
    • paper backup
  1. Drive to the trailhead
  2. Hike the horseshoe
def distance(a, b):
    return abs(a - b)
Day Distance
Saturday 12 km
Sunday 9 km

Take the first day slowly.

Great — swap Sunday for a shorter valley walk.

Done. Sunday is now the Watkin valley path, about 6 km.

Total ascent drops to 400 m.
